lines.text: Risk on, green. Risk off, red. Here is why it controls your week.
Risk on. Money flowing into Bitcoin, equities, growth. Traders are confident.
Risk off. Money fleeing to the dollar, gold, bonds. Traders are scared.
AlgoSphere's regime engine tells you which world you are in. Right now. Per asset.
Trade buy in risk on. Trade short or sit out in risk off. Stop fighting the regime.
See today's regime. Free dashboard. Link in bio.
